ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sanctioned_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sanctioned entity */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group the entity belongs to */,
  "primary_alias_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary alias of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., Individual, Organization) */,
  "regime" TEXT /* Regime under which the entity is sanctioned */,
  "listed_on" TEXT /* Date the entity was listed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the entity's information was last updated */,
  "country_of_birth" TEXT /* Country of birth for individuals */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of individuals */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the entity */,
  "other_information" TEXT /* Additional detailed information about the entity */,
  "reason_for_inclusion" TEXT /* Detailed reason why the entity is on the list */,
  "source_of_information" TEXT /* The source from which the information was obtained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the listing (e.g., active, removed) */,
  "risk_level" INTEGER /* A rating to indicate the level of risk associated with the entity */,
  "last_reviewed" TEXT /* Date when the entity's information was last reviewed */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last reviewed the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sanctioned_entities_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sanctioned_entities_primary_alias_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_alias_id") REFERENCES aliases ("alias_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sanctioned_entities_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aliases" (
  "alias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alias */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity the alias belongs to */,
  "alias_type" TEXT /* Type of the alias (e.g., AKA, Prime Alias) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the alias */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the alias */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the alias */,
  "suffix" TEXT /* Suffix of the alias */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the alias */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the alias */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the alias information */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* A rating to indicate the reliability of the alias */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the alias became known */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the alias was last used or confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alias_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aliases_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES sanctioned_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of the group (e.g., Individual, Organization) */,
  "regime" TEXT /* Regime under which the group is sanctioned */,
  "listed_on" TEXT /* Date the group was listed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the group's information was last updated */,
  "other_information" TEXT /* Additional detailed information about the group */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the leader of the group */,
  "parent_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent group */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the group operates */,
  "affiliations" TEXT /* Other groups or entities the group is affiliated with */,
  "risk_level" INTEGER /* A rating to indicate the level of risk associated with the group */,
  "last_reviewed" TEXT /* Date when the group's information was last reviewed */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last reviewed the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_parent_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES sanctioned_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity the address belongs to */,
  "address_1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "address_2" TEXT /* Second line of the address */,
  "address_3" TEXT /* Third line of the address */,
  "address_4" TEXT /* Fourth line of the address */,
  "address_5" TEXT /* Fifth line of the address */,
  "address_6" TEXT /* Sixth line of the address */,
  "post_zip_code" TEXT /* Post or zip code of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the address information */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* A rating to indicate the reliability of the address */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the address became known */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the address was last used or confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES sanctioned_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., UK Sanctions List Ref, UN Ref) */,
  "document_reference" TEXT /* Reference number or identifier for the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date of the document */,
  "document_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the document */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the document */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* A rating to indicate the reliability of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the actual document file (if stored) */,
  "last_reviewed" TEXT /* Date when the document was last reviewed */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last reviewed the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES sanctioned_entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
